name: Raja Nagaraju
title: Software Engineer | Full Stack Developer
summary: I design and develop scalable, high-performance web applications with exceptional user experiences. Passionate about building innovative solutions using modern technologies.

paragraphs: I'm a software engineer with a relentless curiosity for how things work — and an even deeper drive to make them work better. Over the past several years I've shipped products that serve thousands of users across fintech, SaaS, and consumer platforms.

My journey started with a single HTML file and a question: 'how does this end up on a screen?' That question turned into a career spanning the full stack — from pixel-perfect interfaces to distributed backends and the cloud infrastructure beneath them.
I believe great engineering is part craft, part empathy. I obsess over user experience, write code that's a joy for the next engineer to read, and never stop learning.

highlights.title: Full Stack Development
highlights.desc: End-to-end product engineering from interface to infrastructure.

highlights.title: System Design
highlights.desc: Architecting scalable, resilient systems that grow with the product.

highlights.title: API Development
highlights.desc: Clean, performant REST & GraphQL APIs built to last.

highlights.title: Cloud Solutions
highlights.desc: Deploying and scaling on AWS with modern DevOps practices.

responsibilities: Lead engineering for a multi-tenant SaaS platform serving 50k+ users.
Designed event-driven microservices on AWS with sub-100ms p95 latency.
Mentor a team of 5 engineers and drive code-quality standards.
achievements: Cut infrastructure cost 38% through architectural redesign.
Shipped a redesign that lifted activation by 27%.

responsibilities: Built core payment flows handling millions in monthly volume.
Owned the public API used by 200+ B2B integrations.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines and observability stack.
Delivered web platforms for startups across 3 continents.
Contributed to several open-source TypeScript libraries.
achievements: Earned a top-1% rating on the freelance marketplace.

projects.name: Lumen Analytics

projects.challenge: Handle 50k RPS without breaking the bank.

testimonials.name: Aarav Mehta
testimonials.feedback: Raja is one of those rare engineers who is equally strong on architecture, product instincts, and execution. He raised the bar for our entire team.

testimonials.name: Sofia Alvarez
testimonials.feedback: He doesn't just ship features — he ships polished, thoughtful experiences. Working with Raja is the easiest collaboration I've had.

testimonials.name: Daniel Chen
testimonials.feedback: We launched our MVP in 6 weeks because of Raja. He turned ambiguous ideas into a beautiful, production-ready product.

testimonials.name: Priya Iyer
testimonials.feedback: Deeply technical, calm under pressure, and a brilliant mentor. Anyone would be lucky to have him on their team.
